title: Practical IT job scenarios
description: Original workplace scenarios based on public role and task frameworks. These are not copied certification questions.

sources.name: CISA Incident and Vulnerability Response Playbooks

question.en: A user cannot sign in and says the password was recently changed. What should an L1 technician do first?
question.zh-Hans: 用户无法登录，并表示最近更改过密码。L1 技术员首先应该做什么？
question.zh-Hant: 使用者無法登入，並表示最近更改過密碼。L1 技術員首先應該做什麼？
question.ms: Seorang pengguna tidak boleh log masuk dan mengatakan kata laluan baru sahaja ditukar. Apakah tindakan pertama juruteknik L1?

en: A user reports that a new password does not work. What is the first support action?

text.en: Verify the user’s identity and check account status according to policy.
Delete the user account and recreate it.
Disable multi-factor authentication for the user.
Reset every user’s password.

question.en: Several users report that one shared printer is unavailable. What should the helpdesk check before replacing the printer?
question.zh-Hans: 多名用户报告共享打印机不可用。服务台在更换打印机前应该检查什么？
question.zh-Hant: 多名使用者報告共用印表機無法使用。服務台在更換印表機前應該檢查什麼？
question.ms: Beberapa pengguna melaporkan pencetak kongsi tidak tersedia. Apakah yang perlu disemak sebelum menggantikan pencetak?

en: A shared printer is offline for multiple users. What should be checked first?

text.en: Whether the issue is isolated to the printer, network path, or print server.
Whether every workstation needs a new monitor.
Whether the users have enough local disk space.
Whether the printer’s wallpaper is correct.

question.en: A user clicked a suspicious link and entered credentials. What is the safest immediate action for the helpdesk?
question.zh-Hans: 用户点击了可疑链接并输入凭据。服务台最安全的立即行动是什么？
question.zh-Hant: 使用者點擊了可疑連結並輸入憑據。服務台最安全的立即行動是什麼？
question.ms: Seorang pengguna mengklik pautan mencurigakan dan memasukkan kelayakan. Apakah tindakan segera paling selamat?

en: What should happen immediately after a user reports entering a password into a phishing site?

text.en: Record the details, follow the incident procedure, and escalate while protecting the account.
Ignore it unless the user sees a pop-up.
Forward the message to more users for confirmation.
Delete all security logs.

question.en: A workstation can ping an IP address but cannot open a service by hostname. Which area should L2 investigate first?
question.zh-Hans: 工作站可以 ping IP 地址，但无法通过主机名打开服务。L2 应首先调查哪个方面？
question.zh-Hant: 工作站可以 ping IP 位址，但無法透過主機名稱開啟服務。L2 應首先調查哪個方面？
question.ms: Stesen kerja boleh ping alamat IP tetapi tidak boleh membuka perkhidmatan menggunakan nama hos. Apakah yang perlu disiasat dahulu oleh L2?

en: IP connectivity works, but hostname access fails. What is the likely first investigation area?

text.en: DNS configuration or name resolution.
The monitor refresh rate.
The keyboard layout.
The printer toner.

question.en: A user can open a shared folder but cannot modify files after changing departments. What should L2 verify?
question.zh-Hans: 用户转部门后可以打开共享文件夹但无法修改文件。L2 应验证什么？
question.zh-Hant: 使用者轉部門後可以開啟共用資料夾但無法修改檔案。L2 應驗證什麼？
question.ms: Pengguna boleh membuka folder kongsi tetapi tidak boleh mengubah fail selepas berpindah jabatan. Apakah yang perlu disahkan oleh L2?

en: A user can read a share but cannot edit it after a role change. What should be checked?

text.en: Effective group membership and both share and file-system permissions.
The computer’s screen resolution.
The laptop battery health only.
The user’s browser history.

question.en: A critical file server is suspected to be corrupted. Before restoring data, what should the administrator confirm?
question.zh-Hans: 关键文件服务器疑似损坏。恢复数据前，管理员应该确认什么？
question.zh-Hant: 關鍵檔案伺服器疑似損壞。復原資料前，管理員應該確認什麼？
question.ms: Pelayan fail kritikal disyaki rosak. Sebelum memulihkan data, apakah yang perlu disahkan oleh pentadbir?

en: Before restoring a damaged file server, what is an important first check?

text.en: The recovery point, backup integrity, business impact, and restoration procedure.
That all users have changed their desktop wallpaper.
That monitoring has been permanently disabled.
That the oldest backup is always used.

question.en: A vulnerability affects a production server. What is the most responsible next step before applying the patch?
question.zh-Hans: 生产服务器存在漏洞。应用补丁前最负责的下一步是什么？
question.zh-Hant: 生產伺服器存在漏洞。套用修補程式前最負責的下一步是什麼？
question.ms: Satu kerentanan menjejaskan pelayan produksi. Apakah langkah seterusnya yang paling bertanggungjawab sebelum memasang tampalan?

en: A production server needs an urgent security patch. What should happen before deployment?

text.en: Assess impact, test where practical, schedule or authorize the change, and prepare rollback.
Apply it blindly to every server at once.
Delete the change record.
Disable backups to make the patch faster.

question.en: An employee leaves the company. Which action best follows secure account-lifecycle practice?
question.zh-Hans: 员工离开公司。哪项行动最符合安全的账户生命周期实践？
question.zh-Hant: 員工離開公司。哪項行動最符合安全的帳戶生命週期實務？
question.ms: Seorang pekerja meninggalkan syarikat. Apakah tindakan yang paling mematuhi amalan kitar hayat akaun yang selamat?

en: What should an administrator do when an employee is offboarded?

text.en: Disable access promptly, preserve required records, transfer ownership, and document the change.
Keep the account active indefinitely.
Share the account password with the manager.
Remove all audit records.

question.en: Users in one VLAN cannot reach their default gateway, while other VLANs work. Which switch configuration should be checked first?
question.zh-Hans: 一个 VLAN 中的用户无法访问默认网关，而其他 VLAN 正常。首先应检查哪个交换机配置？
question.zh-Hant: 一個 VLAN 中的使用者無法存取預設閘道，而其他 VLAN 正常。首先應檢查哪個交換器設定？
question.ms: Pengguna dalam satu VLAN tidak boleh mencapai get lalai, manakala VLAN lain berfungsi. Konfigurasi suis manakah perlu disemak dahulu?

en: Only one VLAN cannot reach its gateway. What should the network engineer inspect first?

text.en: VLAN membership, trunk tagging, and the switch port configuration.
The server’s keyboard driver.
The monitor cable.
The user’s email signature.

question.en: A remote subnet is unreachable, but local hosts and the router interface are available. What should the engineer inspect next?
question.zh-Hans: 远程子网无法访问，但本地主机和路由器接口可用。工程师下一步应检查什么？
question.zh-Hant: 遠端子網路無法存取，但本地主機和路由器介面可用。工程師下一步應檢查什麼？
question.ms: Subnet jauh tidak boleh dicapai, tetapi hos tempatan dan antara muka penghala tersedia. Apakah yang perlu diperiksa seterusnya?

en: Local connectivity works but a remote subnet is unreachable. What is the next investigation?

text.en: Routing table, route advertisement, next hop, and relevant ACL or firewall rules.
The user’s mouse settings.
The printer paper tray.
The office lighting schedule.

question.en: Security monitoring indicates an administrator account is being used from an unusual location. What should happen first?
question.zh-Hans: 安全监控显示管理员账户正在从异常位置使用。首先应该做什么？
question.zh-Hant: 安全監控顯示管理員帳戶正在從異常位置使用。首先應該做什麼？
question.ms: Pemantauan keselamatan menunjukkan akaun pentadbir digunakan dari lokasi luar biasa. Apakah yang perlu berlaku dahulu?

en: An admin account shows suspicious activity. What is the first incident-response priority?

text.en: Validate the alert, preserve evidence, and follow the incident procedure for containment and escalation.
Post the account details publicly.
Delete the authentication logs.
Wait several weeks before documenting it.

question.en: An L1 technician cannot resolve an outage after the approved troubleshooting steps. What makes the escalation useful to L2?
question.zh-Hans: L1 技术员按照批准的步骤仍无法解决中断。什么信息能让升级给 L2 更有用？
question.zh-Hant: L1 技術員按照核准步驟仍無法解決中斷。什麼資訊能讓升級給 L2 更有用？
question.ms: Juruteknik L1 tidak dapat menyelesaikan gangguan selepas langkah penyelesaian yang diluluskan. Apakah yang menjadikan eskalasi berguna kepada L2?

en: What should an L1 ticket contain when escalating an unresolved outage?

text.en: Impact, affected users or systems, timeline, symptoms, tests performed, results, and relevant logs.
Only the words ‘it does not work’.
The technician’s unrelated personal notes.
No timestamps or reproduction details.
